# wordpress_application_password_ephemeral (Ephemeral Resource)

Creates a short-lived WordPress application password for ephemeral Terraform workflows without persisting the password in state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name for the generated application password.
- `user_id` (Number) WordPress user ID that will own the generated application password.

### Optional

- `app_id` (String) Optional UUID provided by the caller to identify the client application.
- `delete_on_close` (Boolean) Whether Terraform should delete the generated application password during ephemeral close. Defaults to `true`.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) GMT timestamp of when the application password was created.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Generated application password value returned by WordPress.
- `uuid` (String) Unique identifier of the generated application password.
